person_name: Theodorus, senior imperial secretary (notarius) under Constantius II and Julian
person_name_full: Theodorus, senior imperial secretary (notarius) under Constantius II and Julian
notes: Senior imperial secretary (notarius) under emperors Constantius II and Julian, noted for his distinguished and noble character.

docs.title: BOOK XXIX
docs.author: Ammianus Marcellinus
docs.excerpt: … the only man whose tongue was never unbridled, but who always reflected on what he was going to say, yet without ever being restrained by any fear of danger. 9.

docs.title: Letter 50023
docs.author: Augustine of Hippo
docs.subject_summary: 1. Before entering on the subject on which I have resolved to write to your Grace, I shall briefly state my reasons for the terms used in the title of this letter, lest these should surprise either yo
docs.excerpt: May the Lord our God grant you a calm and conciliatory spirit, my dearly beloved lord and brother!

docs.excerpt: I'm not sure if that's true — but something very similar has happened with you. I've developed a real affection for your genuine, good-hearted soul. Yet actually seeing you has been as difficult as everything else in my life
